untranslatable_reason: Broadening Formation pattern detection requires specialized pattern recognition logic (identifying expanding price ranges, tracking multiple trend lines, and confirming breakout direction) that cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, Returns, Bar Properties). The signal requires explicit detection of: (1) formation of broadening pattern with expanding range, (2) second broadening formation confirmation, (3) horizontal trend line identification and piercing. These require candlestick pattern analysis and trendline detection capabilities not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Signal specifies: wait for downward breakout confirmation on broadening formation before entering SHORT. Entry requires price to pierce lower horizontal trendline. Exit should occur at better price after trendline pierce. Mapped a basic pivot-based approximation (entry below S1, exit above S1) but this does NOT capture the true broadening formation pattern logic required by Bulkowski's rule. The pattern recognition component is untranslatable with current indicators.
